item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response directly refuses the requested next template field, frames the repeated pattern as downstream field/checkbox additions after coordination failures, names the prior incidents plus the new offer issue, and moves upstream to ownership, confirmation authority, and stop/go conditions. It does not provide any usable treatment-field copy, field name, placement, checklist, or implementation step for the requested patch."}
